status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 4 / COMBINATION ANALYTICS BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
mechanism_summary: No combination mechanism is validated. Component pairing does not establish interaction, compatibility or combined biological benefit.
evidence_maturity: Component evidence is preclinical-dominant. No direct fixed-ratio blend evidence has been closed into CertiAura.
regulatory_headline: UNAPPROVED SUPPLIER COMBINATION / COMPONENT AND CO-FORMULATION EVIDENCE INSUFFICIENT

catalogue_supplier_skus.specification: BPC 2 mg + TB 2 mg; 4 mg x 10 vials
BPC 5 mg + TB 5 mg; 10 mg x 10 vials
BPC 10 mg + TB 10 mg; 20 mg x 10 vials

closure_class: TWO-COMPONENT REPAIR BLEND / TB FRAGMENT AND RATIO IDENTITY
closure_state: BLOCKED — EXACT TB COMPONENT, BPC-157 FORM, FIXED RATIO, CO-LYOPHILISATION, STABILITY AND HUMAN COMBINATION EVIDENCE UNVERIFIED
authoritative_product_boundary: FDA identifies BPC-157 and thymosin beta-4 fragment LKKTETQ, also called TB-500, among bulk substances that may present significant safety risks in compounding. The catalogue term TB does not by itself establish full-length thymosin beta-4, the LKKTETQ fragment or another sequence.
critical_closure_controls: BB4, BB10 and BB20 remain separate strength SKUs within one blend family
TB is not assumed to be full-length thymosin beta-4
Component evidence is not combination evidence
No repair, tendon, injury or healing claim
No dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
